gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/201)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/201)
text: رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ يُعْجِبُهُ النَّظَرُ إِلَى الْأُتْرُجِّ الْأَخْضَرِ وَ التُّفَّاحِ الْأَحْمَرِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ali Bin Muhammad Al Qasany, from Abu Ayoub Al Madainy, from Suleyman Bin Ja’far Al Ja’fary,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> that Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> liked looking at the green Citron and the red Apple’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Ali ibn Muhammad al-Qasaniy from abu Ayyub al-Madiniy from Sulayman ibn Ja‘far al-Ja‘fariy who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, liked to look at the green citron and red apple.’”
